architecture.summary: Add bulkFetchIssueStates() to GitHubClientV2, pre-fetch all FS-tagged issue states in 1 search call. Reconciler reads from map instead of per-issue getIssue(). Milestone fetch capped at 20 with sort=updated.

integrations.summary: Uses existing gh CLI search issues command. No new external integrations. Reuses listIssuesInTimeRange pattern from github-client-v2.ts.

ui-ux.summary: CLI gets --full flag for quarterly deep reconciliation. Default behavior unchanged from user perspective, just faster. Dry-run output shows reduced API call count.

performance.summary: Reduces API calls from ~70 to ~3 per typical run. Bulk search replaces N individual calls. Milestone cap prevents unbounded pagination. Session cache still applies for edge-case fallback calls.

security.summary: No new auth mechanisms. Uses existing gh CLI auth. No secrets changes. PAT sanitization in error messages unchanged.

edge-cases.summary: Issue not in bulk search results (e.g., title doesn't contain [FS-): falls back to individual getIssue(). Empty search results: no reconciliation needed. Rate limit still checked pre-flight (<100 remaining = skip). --full flag bypasses all caps for deep scan.
